improvement_built.thesis: Build performance-check.sh: after every deploy, curl each HQ API endpoint 3 times, record min/mean/max response time in ms. Compare against 7-day baseline from agents/sam/ledger/performance-baseline.jsonl. If any endpoint regresses >20%, write P2 alert to kai/ledger/known-issues.jsonl. Use curl -w '%{time_total}' -o /dev/null -s.
improvement_built.research_summary: Performance baseline exists with 5 entries — regression detection script needed
improvement_built.success_metric: New file exists, is executable or importable, produces structured JSONL output
